milestone: Mapped the runtime selector-table dispatcher that invokes handlers registered in 0x140e5e400.

runtime_dispatcher.caller_role: Drains a client/root event queue and invokes the selector-table dispatcher for 0x10-byte queue records.

selector_source.notes: Selector is read as a 16-bit value from the stream/descriptor attached to the queued parser object.

handler_invocation.meaning: Compares slot selector against sentinel 0x495 loaded at 0x14008cb10.
Second handler argument is the queued parser/session object.
First handler argument is the dispatcher/context object stored at RDI+8.

dispatch_when_stream_selector_is_0x107: 0x14008cad0 reads selector 0x107 from the queued stream/descriptor.
It calls 0x1401f6c90 with RCX from dispatcher context and RDX as the queued parser/session object.

pump_owner.interpretation: Broad client/bootstrap pump that includes jav_config/bootstrap setup and drains the handler queues.

native_tool_progress.purpose: Recover selector-indexed table dispatches that compute table_base + selector*16, reload the selected slot, load handler pointer, and invoke it.
native_tool_progress.generic_indirect_analyzer_limitation: pe-indirect-dispatches sees CALL RAX at 0x14008cbaa but path-insensitively backtracks through an error fallback LEA; the selector-table scanner captures the normal table path explicitly.

opennxt_947_implications: The OpenNXT 947 server work should treat 0x107 as an outer selector consumed by the client runtime dispatcher, not as the inner child state 0x14.
A server response or queued descriptor that emits selector 0x107 will route through 0x14008cad0 to handler 0x1401f6c90.

The next reverse-engineering task is to map the stream/descriptor layout read by 0x14008cad0 and identify which OpenNXT login/bootstrap packet field controls the 16-bit selector source at 0x14008cb3d.
next_questions: Map the queued parser/session object passed as RDX into 0x1401f6c90.
Trace the descriptor source behind selector load 0x14008cb3d to the network or bootstrap producer.
Continue inside 0x1401f6c90 to pin the exact branch into 0x1401f6d51 and the child state 0x14 transition.
